creator: james.wright@digital-chaos.com
text:
Created attachment 241239
intellij-2023.1-20230401.diff

Updated patch for release of IntelliJ 2023.1

Caveat:
An Exception is logged during startup but seems to fullback with no obvious adverse effects when running the IDE (see below)

2023-04-01 05:13:36,316 [   1458]   WARN - #c.i.o.e.i.FontFamilyServiceImpl - no such method: sun.font.Font2D.getTypographicSubfamilyName()String/invokeVirtual

2023-04-01 05:13:36,332 [   1474]   WARN - #c.i.o.e.i.FontFamilyServiceImpl - Couldn't access required runtime API, will fall back to basic logic of font selection
